story: As an administrator I want to change the role of another user.
As an administrator, I want to delete another user
As a manager of a project, I want to change the roles of another user in this project
As a manager of a project, I want to create an appointment
As a manager, I want to change appointments in my projects
As a developer of a project, I want to insert a new appointment in the project.
As a manager of a project, I want to modify time and place of meetings.
As a manager, I want to modify my projects
As a manager, I want to change the status of a project
As an end user, I want to change the type of an appointment
As an administrator, I want to modify projects
As an end user, I want to edit appointments
As a project manager, I would like to add users to the project
As a project manager, I want to remove users from projects
As an administrator, I want to remove users from projects
As a project manager, I want to drop developers from the project
As a project manager, I want to set a new deadline to the project
As a project manager, I want to change the deadline of a project
As an end user, I want to upload new files to my projects
As an end user, I want to modify data that I have uploaded before
As a user, I want to delete files from projects
As a project manager I want to see the users of my projects
As a project manager I want to inspect the developers of my projects
